src/test/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Activate the 'test' Spring profile to ensure correct configuration loading during test execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency for API gateway functionality.
Add spring-dotenv dependency to load environment variables from .env files.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java classes.
Add Springfox Boot Starter for Swagger API documentation generation.
Add Springfox Swagger UI dependency to serve the Swagger documentation interface.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to generate code coverage reports during the build process.
Define a production Maven profile to configure build steps for production deployment.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to the production profile to build the React frontend during the Maven build.
Add maven-antrun-plugin to the production profile to copy built frontend assets to the backend output directory.
Remove Flyway dependency as it is no longer needed or replaced by another migration strategy.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add patterns to ignore temporary files generated by Emacs editor.
Add patterns to ignore temporary directories and reports generated by Stryker mutation testing tool.
Add pattern to ignore the static output directory of Storybook builds.
Add pattern to ignore package-lock.json at the root level while explicitly keeping the one in the frontend directory.
Add pattern to ignore local environment configuration files containing sensitive data.

dev_environment.general_idea: Expose port 6006 in the development container to support Storybook or similar UI development tools.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add Maven resource filtering placeholder for active Spring profiles to support environment-specific configurations.
Disable the Open Session in View pattern to prevent lazy loading issues and improve performance, a common best practice in modern Spring Boot applications.
Configure Google OAuth2 client ID using environment variables with fallback to .env file and a default unset value.
Configure Google OAuth2 client secret using environment variables with fallback to .env file and a default unset value.
Define the OAuth2 scopes requested from Google as email and profile.
Expose the mappings endpoint via Spring Boot Actuator for debugging and monitoring purposes.
Set the base path for Swagger v2 documentation endpoints.
Set Hibernate DDL auto mode to update to automatically adjust the database schema based on entity changes.
Define a custom property for admin emails sourced from environment variables with a fallback default value.
Explicitly set the path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to maintain compatibility with older Spring MVC behavior or specific routing requirements.
